zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley於1265年出生。她於大約1288年與Mr. Ballisdon結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley于1265年出生。她于大约1288年与Mr. Ballisdon结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Kingsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Kingsley, in Cheshire, Hampshire, and Staffordshire. The placenames derive from Old English cing ‘king’ (genitive cinges) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley was born in 1265. She married Mr. Ballisdon about 1288. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley est née en 1265. Elle a épousé Mr. Ballisdon environ 1288. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley wurde 1265 geboren. Sie hat um 1288 Mr. Ballisdon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley è nata il nel 1265. Lei sposato Mr. Ballisdon circa 1288. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsleyは1265年に生まれた。約1288年にMr. Ballisdonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley(은)는 1265년 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1288년 Mr. Ballisdon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley nasceu em 1265. Ela casou-se com Mr. Ballisdon aproximadamente 1288. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley родилась в 1265 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mr. Ballisdon около 1288 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingsley nació en 1265. Se casó con Mr. Ballisdon aproximadamente 1288. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
